data.title: Ukraine's Economic Future to Diversify Beyond Agriculture, Zelensky Says
data.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky emphasized the need for Ukraine's economy to diversify beyond its traditional reliance on agriculture. According to Jin10, Zelensky highlighted the establishment of a robust defense industrial complex as a significant step towards this economic diversification. He underscored the importance of developing various sectors to ensure a more resilient and sustainable economic future for Ukraine.

data.title: ether.fi: LayerZero bridging functionality for weETH and eETH will be restored within 24 hours.
data.description: Ether.fi announced on the X platform that, following guidance from its security partners, it will restore the LayerZero bridging functionality between weETH and eETH within the next 24 hours. Ether.fi had previously confirmed that its Liquid vault was not directly exposed to the risks of the Kelp rsETH incident, but as a precaution, it decided to suspend the LayerZero cross-chain bridging functionality between weETH and eETH until the root cause of the Kelp rsETH incident was clarified. Simultaneously, for Liquid (ETH, BTC, USD), sETHFI, and eBTC products, the relevant Teller contracts have been suspended to block the LayerZero OFT bridging path, and deposit and withdrawal functions for related assets have also been suspended. Ether.fi is currently working closely with its security partners.

data.title: AI Agents Transforming On-Chain Operations with MuleRun's Innovations
data.description:
On April 21, MuleRun's Chief Technology Officer, Shu Junliang, shared insights at an event focused on 'Decoding Web 4.0: When AI Agents Take Over On-Chain Permissions.' According to BlockBeats, Shu emphasized that AI Agents should be viewed as 'personal assistants,' aiming to reduce usage costs and barriers through technological advancements. These agents are structured into modules such as interaction, perception, reasoning, and memory, each supported by different underlying technologies.

Shu highlighted that AI Agents are evolving from traditional text-based interactions on websites or apps to multi-channel communications across platforms like Telegram, Discord, Feishu, DingTalk, and WeChat. This shift aims to provide a seamless interaction experience, significantly lowering user barriers.

MuleRun has proposed an infrastructure solution centered on 'funds permission security' for on-chain scenarios. This includes sandbox isolation, cloud execution, and a fully traceable mechanism to create a trustless operating environment, addressing potential security issues during automatic execution by agents.

In terms of capability evolution, AI Agents will develop self-evolving decision models, continuously learning users' trading strategies and risk preferences to form personalized research and execution systems. Additionally, through a knowledge network mechanism, these agents will enable strategy accumulation and sharing, promoting the reuse and dissemination of on-chain cognition and capabilities.

Shu further noted that as AI Agent capabilities advance, the division of labor in on-chain transactions will be restructured. Agents will gradually take over information processing and execution tasks, allowing humans to focus on higher-level strategy formulation and critical decision-making.

data.title: Bithumb will list CHIP Korean Won.
data.description: According to official announcements, Bithumb will launch CHIP (Korean Won) pairs.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 76,000 USDT with a 2.08% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 21, 2026, 06:35 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 76,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 76,070.796875 USDT, with a narrowed 2.08% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Japanese and South Korean stocks closed higher, with the KOSPI index hitting a new high.
data.description: South Korea's KOSPI index closed up 169.38 points, or 2.72%, at 6388.47 on Tuesday, April 21, a record high. Japan's Nikkei 225 index closed up 524.28 points, or 0.89%, at 59349.17 on Tuesday, April 21. (Jinshi)

data.title: Aave Updates on rsETH Event Progress
data.description:
Aave announced on the X platform that the WETH reserves in the Ethereum Core V3 market have been unfrozen, allowing users to supply WETH again. According to Odaily, the loan-to-value ratio (LTV) remains at 0.

Meanwhile, WETH reserves on Ethereum Prime, Arbitrum, Base, Mantle, and Linea networks remain frozen. Aave stated that service providers will continue to address the situation and provide updates on the progress.

data.title: AI TRENDS | White Paper Explores AI Agent's Role in Web3 Economy
data.description: A recent white paper delves into the evolving role of AI agents in production, collaboration, and trading activities. According to PANews, the document systematically examines the progression of on-chain finance and tokenized infrastructure in the era of the agent economy. It further analyzes the development logic of the next phase of the Web3 economy from various dimensions, including production relationships, value expression, institutional structure, and business paradigms.

data.title: Hackers Exploit Rules Rather Than Breaking Them
data.description: Hackers often do not 'break' rules; instead, they 'exploit' them. According to PANews, this approach highlights the need for robust security measures that address vulnerabilities within existing systems. By understanding how hackers operate, organizations can better protect themselves against potential threats. The focus should be on closing loopholes and strengthening defenses to prevent exploitation.

data.title: BIT: BTC demand structure recovers, ETF net inflows hit a new high since mid-January.
data.description: Analyst Markus Thielen stated that the demand structure for Bitcoin is gradually recovering. He pointed out that Strategy's continued accumulating holdings provides stable buying support, Coinbase Premium is rebounding, and the spot Bitcoin ETF saw a single-day net inflow of $664 million, the highest level since mid-January. He believes that corporate funds, ETF inflows, and US spot demand are working together, coupled with the return of stablecoin funds, to gradually improve market liquidity. Against this backdrop, Bitcoin prices may enter a new trading range. If the relevant trends continue, the probability of an upward move increases, but the overall trend is likely to remain range-bound.

data.title: Trading Spikes Detected Before Trump's Market-Moving Statements
data.description: BBC has identified unusual trading spikes occurring as little as 14 minutes before U.S. President Donald Trump's market-moving statements during his second term. According to NS3.AI, these patterns were linked to oil trades preceding Trump's comments on Iran and to bets made ahead of his April 9, 2025, tariff pause. The report also highlighted Polymarket wagers that transformed $32,500 into $436,000, alongside six accounts that collectively earned approximately $1.2 million following a U.S. strike against Iran by February 28.

data.title: ASTEROID Creator's Mother Withdraws Funds Amid Threats
data.description: The mother of ASTEROID's creator reported that she withdrew and transferred funds related to Bags on the same day due to threats. According to NS3.AI, she claimed her social media account was compromised and stated that she has not conducted any further operations since the incident.

data.title: DWF Labs Partner Highlights Challenges in DeFi Market Yields
data.description: Andrei Grachev, a partner at DWF Labs, has expressed concerns about the sustainability of high yields in the current decentralized finance (DeFi) market. According to NS3.AI, Grachev noted that these yields are often reliant on mechanisms such as airdrops, recursive lending, and incentive subsidies. He emphasized that these factors contribute to the difficulty in maintaining truly risk-free returns over an extended period.

data.title: Upbit will launch CHIP Korean Won pair
data.description: According to an official announcement, Upbit will launch CHIP (Korean Won) pairs.

data.title: UK Wage Growth Exceeds Expectations in February
data.description: The UK's average wage growth excluding bonuses for the three months ending in February was reported at 3.6%, surpassing the anticipated 3.5% and slightly below the previous figure of 3.8%. According to Jin10, this data indicates a steady increase in wages despite economic uncertainties. The wage growth reflects ongoing labor market dynamics and could influence future monetary policy decisions by the Bank of England.

data.title: DWF Labs Partner: DeFi yields are not risk-free, and high returns are unsustainable in the long run.
data.description: Andrei Grachev, a partner at DWF Labs, stated that the current state of the DeFi market indicates that truly risk-free returns do not exist. While DeFi has value in improving transaction efficiency, high returns typically rely on factors such as airdrops, revolving lending, and incentive subsidies, making them difficult to sustain in the long term.

data.title: Binance Shares Tips for Successful Live Streaming
data.description:
Binance announced on X a set of strategies aimed at enhancing live streaming experiences for both novice and experienced users. The guidance focuses on establishing a strong personal brand, maintaining a steady pace, minimizing awkward pauses, and increasing potential earnings during live broadcasts. These tips are shared as part of Binance's 'Live Streaming Carnival Season,' encouraging users to apply the strategies immediately to improve their streaming sessions.

The initiative is designed to help new streamers get started while offering seasoned broadcasters ways to refine their skills. By emphasizing the importance of creating a relatable persona, streamers can engage more effectively with their audience. Maintaining a consistent rhythm throughout the broadcast helps keep viewers interested and reduces the likelihood of losing engagement due to prolonged silences. Additionally, the advice includes methods to optimize revenue generation during live streams, providing practical steps for users to enhance their financial outcomes.

Binance's announcement underscores the platform's commitment to supporting its community by offering valuable insights and tools for content creators. The 'Live Streaming Carnival Season' serves as an opportunity for users to implement these strategies and potentially boost their streaming success. This initiative reflects Binance's broader efforts to foster a dynamic and interactive environment where users can thrive and maximize their potential in the digital space.

data.title: Upcoming Release of Key Economic Indicators from Switzerland and the UK
data.description: Switzerland's March trade balance, along with the UK's February three-month ILO unemployment rate, March jobless claims, and unemployment rate, are set to be released in ten minutes. According to Jin10, these indicators are closely watched by market participants for insights into economic conditions and labor market trends in both countries.

data.title: SpaceX Executive Compensation Revealed in Recent Filing
data.description: SpaceX's recent filing has disclosed significant executive compensation figures. According to BlockBeats, the document reveals that President Gwynne Shotwell received a total compensation of $85.8 million last year, placing her among the highest-paid executives in the United States. Shotwell, who also serves as Chief Operating Officer, has a base salary of $1 million, with the majority of her compensation coming from stock options and bonuses. The filing also highlights that Chief Financial Officer Bret Johnson earned a total of $9.8 million. Meanwhile, CEO Elon Musk, a major shareholder in SpaceX, paid himself a salary of only $54,080.

data.title: Who Is Building Homes and Setting Roles for AI Agents?
data.description: According to PANews, the development of AI agents involves various stakeholders who are responsible for creating environments, providing resources, and defining roles. These agents are designed to perform specific tasks and require a structured framework to operate effectively. The process includes setting up virtual spaces where AI agents can function, as well as establishing guidelines for their interactions and responsibilities. The collaboration among developers, engineers, and policymakers is crucial in shaping the future of AI agents, ensuring they are integrated into society in a beneficial and ethical manner. As AI technology continues to evolve, the roles and responsibilities of these agents are expected to expand, necessitating ongoing oversight and adaptation.
